Dimacria apiifolia, also known as Dimocarpus apiifolius, is a plant species in the Anacardiaceae family. It is a tree that grows in tropical regions and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Dimacaria apiifolia include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
